task_completion.description: Locate and open the patient record for Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the patient profile, chart, or dashboard specifically for 'Maria Santos'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Family Medical History section and open the form to add a new record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or page titled 'Family Medical History', 'Add Family History', or similar is open and visible.
The word 'Father' is entered or selected in a dropdown or text field labeled 'Relation', 'Relationship', 'Family Member', or similar.
The phrase 'Myocardial Infarction' is entered or selected in a field labeled 'Condition', 'Disease', 'Problem', or similar.

task_completion.description: Include the exact phrase about the heart attack in the notes or comments field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact phrase 'Father suffered a myocardial infarction at age 55' is typed into a 'Notes', 'Comments', or 'Description' text area.

task_completion.description: Save or submit the Family Medical History record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Record saved'), or the newly added entry is visible in the patient's Family Medical History list view.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the medical application rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser or EMR/EHR application UI, without terminal windows executing SQL or script commands to insert the data.

integrity.description: The agent entered the information into the actual medical records application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entry occurs within a structured medical application form, not in a generic text editor (like Notepad) or a blank document.

integrity.description: The agent actually submitted the form rather than just typing the text and stopping.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the saved record in a view mode, a confirmation dialog, or a cursor clicking the 'Save'/'Submit' button, rather than just the filled-out but unsubmitted form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Maria Santos. Required Relation: Father. Required Condition: Myocardial Infarction. Required Exact Phrase in Notes/Comments: 'Father suffered a myocardial infarction at age 55'.
